title: BICTA 2026 Registration Opens with Record Interest
excerpt: Over 500 teams have pre-registered for BICTA 2026, making it the most anticipated edition in the festival's history.

title: New AI/ML Track Added to National Datathon
excerpt: The National Datathon Championship introduces a dedicated AI/ML track with exclusive mentorship from industry leaders.

title: Partnership with Google Developer Groups Announced
excerpt: BICTA partners with GDG Bangladesh to provide cloud credits, mentorship, and exclusive workshops for all participants.

title: Prize Pool Increased to ৳3 Million for 2026
excerpt: Thanks to new sponsors, the total prize pool across all BICTA 2026 competitions has been raised to ৳3 million.

title: CyberSec CTF: What You Need to Know
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to preparing for the upcoming CyberSec CTF Challenge, including recommended tools and practice platforms.

title: Winners of AI for Good Hackathon Build Healthcare AI
excerpt: Team NeuralCare won the AI for Good Hackathon with an AI-powered diagnostic tool for rural healthcare centers.

title: Workshop Series: Building with Large Language Models
excerpt: Join our free 4-part workshop series on building production-ready applications using LLMs, RAG, and vector databases.

title: BICTA Alumni Raise $2M in Seed Funding
excerpt: Three startups founded by BICTA alumni have collectively raised $2 million in seed funding from international VCs.

title: Green Tech Sprint Venue Announced: Chittagong
excerpt: The Green Tech Innovation Sprint will be held at the Chittagong Convention Center, featuring dedicated IoT labs and maker spaces.

title: How to Build a Winning Hackathon Team
excerpt: Expert tips on assembling the perfect hackathon team — from finding complementary skills to effective collaboration strategies.
